## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Scope

- [ ] Python code
- [ ] PowerShell script
- [ ] Workflow / CI
- [ ] Docs only

## Validation

- [ ] Ran related tests locally (or explain why not)
- [ ] Ran lint/format checks (if applicable)
- [ ] Verified impacted task(s) in VS Code Tasks (if applicable)

## Risk / Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private keys included
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior changed
